allow: Bash(node -e "const b = require\('@whiskeysockets/baileys'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(b\).filter\(k => k.includes\('make'\) || k.includes\('useMulti'\) || k.includes\('default'\) || k === 'default'\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(./mysql -u root -e "DELETE FROM ayres_audit.messages WHERE message_type = 'unknown'; DELETE FROM ayres_audit.messages WHERE body IS NULL; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as remaining FROM ayres_audit.messages;")
Bash(./mysql -u root -e "DELETE FROM ayres_audit.messages WHERE contact_jid LIKE '%@lid'; DELETE FROM ayres_audit.contacts WHERE jid LIKE '%@lid'; SELECT * FROM ayres_audit.contacts;")
Bash(./mysql -u root -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, message_type, body FROM ayres_audit.messages GROUP BY message_type, body LIMIT 20;")
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql" -u root ayres_audit -e "SELECT id, contact_jid, from_me, message_type, body, timestamp FROM messages ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;")
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql" -u root ayres_audit -e "SELECT id, LEFT\(contact_jid,20\) as jid, from_me, message_type, LEFT\(body,50\) as body, timestamp FROM messages ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;")
